settings.heading_description: Manage your profile and account preferences

profile.heading: Profile settings
profile.section_description: Update your first name, last name and email address
profile.email_not_verified: Your email address is not verified.
profile.resend_verification: Click here to resend the verification email.
profile.verification_link_sent: A new verification link has been sent.

security.section_password_description: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure
security.2fa_description: When you enable two-factor authentication, you will be prompted for a secure pin during login. This pin can be retrieved from a TOTP-supported application on your phone.
security.2fa_enabled_description: You will be prompted for a secure, random pin during login, which you can retrieve from the TOTP-supported application on your phone.

antidote.heading_description: Follow these steps to enable the Antidote Connector on this application.
antidote.status_active: Antidote connector detected — correction buttons are active.
antidote.status_inactive: Antidote connector not detected on this page. Follow the instructions below.

edge.step1: Make sure the Antidote Connector is installed for Edge (downloadable from Druide's website).
edge.step2: Open the Extensions page in Edge:
edge.step3: Find the "Antidote Connector" in the list.
edge.step4: Click "Details", then under "Site access", select "On all sites".
edge.step5: Reload this page — the connector will be active.
edge.tip: Shortcut: click the puzzle icon 🧩 in the top right of Edge, then click "⋯" next to Antidote Connector → "Allow on this site".

chrome.step1: Make sure the Antidote Connector is installed for Chrome (downloadable from Druide's website).
chrome.step2: Open the Extensions page in Chrome:
chrome.step3: Find the "Antidote Connector" in the list.
chrome.step4: Click "Details", then under "Site access", select "On all sites".
chrome.step5: Reload this page — the connector will be active.
chrome.tip: Shortcut: click the puzzle icon 🧩 in the top right of Chrome, then click "⋯" next to Antidote Connector → "Allow on this site".

firefox.step1: Make sure the Antidote Connector is installed for Firefox (downloadable from Druide's website).
firefox.step3: Find the "Antidote Connector" in the extensions list.
firefox.step4: Click the extension, go to the "Permissions" tab and enable "Access your data for all websites".
firefox.step5: Reload this page — the connector will be active.
firefox.tip: Shortcut: click the Antidote Connector icon in the Firefox toolbar → "Allow on this site".

antidote.verify_description: To confirm the connector is active, open the browser console (F12) and type:

delete_account.title: Delete account
delete_account.description: Delete your account and all of its resources
delete_account.warning_message: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.
delete_account.dialog_title: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
delete_account.dialog_description: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will also be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.
delete_account.locked_by_groupe: Your account cannot be deleted because you are currently assigned to an active group. Please contact an administrator to remove this association.

guide.heading_description: Learn how to use the platform's features step by step

profil.title: Edit your profile
profil.description: Update your first name, last name and email address.
steps: Go to Settings → Profile.
Edit your first name, last name or email address.
Click "Save".

langue.title: Change language
langue.description: Switch the interface between French and English.
steps: Go to Settings → Profile.
In the "Language" section, select the desired language.
The page reloads automatically in the new language.

theme.title: Light / dark theme
theme.description: Choose the visual appearance of the platform.
steps: Go to Settings → Appearance.
Select "Light", "Dark" or "System".
The change is immediate.

securite.title: Change password
securite.description: Update your password to keep your account secure.
steps: Go to Settings → Security.
Enter your current password.
Enter and confirm the new password.
Click "Save password".

creer_cours.title: Create a course
creer_cours.description: Set up a new course with its essential information.
steps: From the teacher workspace, click "New course".
Enter the course name and select the institution.
Save — the course is now active.
Add classes, students and project types.

gerer_classes.title: Manage classes
gerer_classes.description: Create and organize your course sections.
steps: Open the relevant course.
In the "Classes" tab, click "Add a class".
Name the class (e.g., Group A) and save.
Repeat for each section.

importer_etudiants.title: Import students (CSV)
importer_etudiants.description: Add multiple students at once via a CSV file.
steps: Open the class to import into.
Click "Import CSV".
Prepare a CSV file with columns: student ID, first name, last name, email.
Select the file and confirm the import.

types_projets.title: Create a project type
types_projets.description: Define a reusable project template for your course.
steps: From your course, go to the "Project types" tab.
Click "New project type" and give it a title.
Add sections (introduction, interview, development, conclusion).
For each section, define instructions and questions.
Enable the project type to make it accessible to groups.

objectifs.title: Add learning objectives
objectifs.description: List the competencies targeted by your course.
steps: In your course, go to the "Objectives" tab.
Click "Add an objective" and write its description.
Reorder objectives by drag and drop if needed.

reference_apa.title: Use APA reference help
steps: From a project type's edit page, click the APA help icon.
Select the source type (book, article, website…).
Fill in the required fields.
Copy the generated reference into your instructions.

echeancier.title: Create a schedule
echeancier.description: Add milestones to guide group progress.
steps: In your course, go to the "Schedule" tab.
Click "Add a step" and set the title and date.
Students see the milestones in their group workspace.

visio.title: Organize a video conference
visio.description: Launch a Jitsi session directly from the platform.
steps: In your course, go to "Video conference".
Create a session link and share it with your students.
Click the link to join the Jitsi session.

approuver_temoin.title: Approve a witness
approuver_temoin.description: Validate an elderly person's participation in your course.
steps: From the teacher workspace, go to the pending witnesses list.
View the witness profile and their chosen themes.
Click "Approve" or "Decline".
An approved witness can be assigned to a group.

verrouiller_cours.title: Lock a course
verrouiller_cours.description: Prevent any course modifications after the final submission.
steps: From your course page, click the lock icon.
Confirm the action — the course becomes read-only.
Students see a page indicating the course is locked.
You can unlock at any time the same way.

echanges.title: Manage exchanges
echanges.description: Communicate with groups via the class discussion thread.
steps: Open the relevant class and go to the "Exchanges" tab.
Read messages from groups.
Reply from the class or group discussion thread.

rejoindre_cours.title: Access your courses
rejoindre_cours.description: View your enrolled courses for the current session.
steps: Log in to the platform.
From the dashboard, click "My courses".
Your enrolled courses appear with their information.

former_groupe.title: Form or join a group
former_groupe.description: Create or join a work group in your class.
steps: From your class, go to the "Groups" tab.
Click "Create a group" or join an existing group.
Your group is ready — members can start collaborating.

editer_projet.title: Edit a project
editer_projet.description: Write and enrich your research project as a team.
steps: From your group, click on the project type to complete.
Navigate between sections (introduction, interview, development…).
Write content in each section.
Changes are saved automatically.
Add media (photos, videos) if the section allows it.

remettre_projet.title: Submit a project
remettre_projet.description: Submit your project when it is ready for evaluation.
steps: From your project, click "Submit project".
All group members must vote to confirm the submission.
Once the vote is complete, the project is submitted to the teacher.
The project becomes read-only after submission.

consulter_notes.title: View your grades
consulter_notes.description: Access your teacher's evaluations and comments.
steps: From your project, go to the "Grades" tab.
View the breakdown by criterion on the correction grid.
Read annotations left by the teacher in the text.

echanges.title: Exchanges with teacher
echanges.description: Ask questions via your group's discussion thread.
steps: From your group, go to the "Exchanges" tab.
Write your message and send it.
The teacher will receive and can reply from their workspace.

profil.title: Complete your profile
profil.description: Enter your availability and topics of interest.
steps: Log in to the platform.
Access your profile from the menu.
Select the themes you wish to share testimony on.
Indicate your availability for interviews.

consentement.title: Video consent
consentement.description: Understand and sign the consent form for recordings.
steps: A consent form will be presented during registration.
Carefully read the terms of use for recordings.
Check your agreement and confirm your signature.
This consent can be reviewed by contacting the institution.

entrevue.title: Participate in an interview
entrevue.description: Prepare for your meeting with students.
steps: The teacher will contact you to confirm the date and format (in-person or video conference).
If the interview is online, a Jitsi link will be provided.
Share your testimony with the student group.
Students will take notes and may record with your consent.

gerer_enseignants.title: Manage teachers
gerer_enseignants.description: Add, edit or delete teacher accounts.
steps: Go to the Administration section.
In the "Teachers" tab, click "Add a teacher".
Fill in the form (name, email, institution).
The teacher receives an invitation by email.
To edit or delete, use the inline actions in the table.

gerer_etablissements.title: Manage institutions
gerer_etablissements.description: Administer the colleges and institutions linked to the platform.
steps: Go to Administration → Institutions.
Click "Add an institution" and fill in the form.
View an institution to see its teachers and themes.
Edit or delete an institution via its dedicated actions.

approuver_temoins.title: Approve witnesses
approuver_temoins.description: Manage the queue of elderly people awaiting validation.
steps: From Administration, view the "Pending witnesses" section.
Click on a witness to see their profile and themes.
Approve or decline the request.
An approved witness becomes available to teachers.

show.locked_message: This document is locked by the teacher. You can view it but not edit it.
show.toc_auto_notice: The table of contents will be generated automatically on export. No input required.
show.page_titre_manuel_hint: The title page is not auto-generated. Write it here — it will be included as-is in the export.
show.tdm_manuel_hint: The table of contents is not auto-generated. Write it here — it will be included as-is in the export.
show.amener_hint: Lead the reader to your topic (general context, anecdote, statistic…)
show.poser_hint: Pose the research question or central problem.
show.diviser_hint: Divide the plan: announce the main sections to be developed.
show.conclusion_hint: Synthesis of developed elements and a broader reflection.

inscription_temoin.title: Registration Request
inscription_temoin.description: Fill out this form to submit your request. An administrator will review your registration.
inscription_temoin.hint_cegeps: Add one or more CEGEPs, then select your themes and/or specify a free theme for each.
inscription_temoin.no_thematiques: No themes available for this CEGEP.
inscription_temoin.description_bio_hint: Who are you? Where are you from? What brought you to this approach?
inscription_temoin.hint_disponible_appel_distance: Check this box if you agree to meet students via videoconference.

inscription_engagements.title: Commitment Form
inscription_engagements.description: Please read and accept each of the following commitments before finalizing your registration.
inscription_engagements.all_required: All commitments below must be accepted to continue.
inscription_engagements.engagement_1: I freely and voluntarily consent to participate in the intergenerational research project and to share my memories with students.
inscription_engagements.engagement_2: I understand that my participation is voluntary and that I may withdraw at any time, without consequence and without having to justify my decision.
inscription_engagements.engagement_3: I commit to respecting the confidentiality of exchanges conducted on the platform.
inscription_engagements.engagement_4: I agree that my personal information will be used for educational purposes, solely within the scope of this project.
inscription_engagements.engagement_5: I certify that the information I have provided in this form is accurate and truthful.
inscription_engagements.engagement_6: I have read and accept the platform's terms of use.
inscription_engagements.hint_signature: Enter your first and last name as they will appear as your signature.
inscription_engagements.back_confirm: Your information will be lost. Do you really want to go back to the form?

personne_agee.no_groups_contact: A teacher will contact you soon.

echanges.no_witness: No witness has been assigned to this group yet. A teacher must first designate one.

index.hint_aide_reference: A guided form will help students format their references according to APA standards.
index.hint_manuel: Students will need to include this element manually.

edit.multiple_submissions_hint: The group can submit their work multiple times.
edit.late_submission_hint: Submission remains possible after the deadline.
edit.sections_hint: Define the parts students will need to write and their input mode.
edit.no_sections: No sections defined. Click "Add" to get started.
edit.label_generer_table_matieres: Automatically generate the table of contents
edit.hint_aide_reference: A guided form will help students format their references according to APA standards.
edit.hint_auto: The export generates this element automatically.
edit.hint_manuel: Students will need to include this element manually.

edit.section_type_paragraphes_desc: The group can dynamically add multiple paragraphs.
edit.section_type_individuel_desc: Each member writes their own version of this section.
edit.section_type_entrevue_desc: Structured concepts with dimensions, indicators and specific questions.
